description: Hands teaching the fundamentals of elimination play, throw-ins, and endplays — stripping side suits and forcing defenders to make losing returns.

hands.title: 201. Eliminate side suits
hands.notes: Strip hearts and clubs, then play diamonds. Defenders must give a ruff-sluff or open diamonds for you.

hands.title: 202. Throw defender in
hands.notes: After stripping side suits, exit with a heart to West. West must lead into your diamond tenace or concede ruff-sluff.

hands.title: 203. Endplay to force lead away from honor
hands.notes: Strip clubs and hearts, then exit. West holds KQ9 of diamonds and must lead away from the honor into your AT tenace.

hands.title: 204. Endplay to concede ruff-and-discard
hands.notes: Eliminate clubs and hearts, then throw West in with a diamond. West has only hearts and clubs left, conceding ruff-and-discard.

hands.title: 205. Simple strip and endplay
hands.notes: Cash AK of hearts, AKQ of clubs, then exit with a heart. Defender must break diamonds or give ruff-sluff.

hands.title: 206. Rectify the count for an endplay
hands.notes: You must lose a heart early to rectify the count — ducking a heart before stripping and throwing West in.

hands.title: 207. Identify endplay position early
hands.notes: Spot the endplay potential at trick one. Avoid cashing the wrong winners — strip methodically before the throw-in.

hands.title: 208. Create the endplay by ducking
hands.notes: Duck a heart to place the lead with West. After winning, West is endplayed — any return helps declarer.

hands.title: 209. Create the endplay by removing exits
hands.notes: Cash clubs and hearts to strip West of safe exit cards. Then throw West in with a heart — forced to lead diamonds or give ruff-sluff.

hands.title: 210. Throw-in with trump still out
hands.notes: Execute the throw-in before drawing all trumps. West still holds a trump but is endplayed on the heart exit.

hands.title: 211. Trump endplay basics
hands.notes: Use a trump as the throw-in card. After stripping side suits, exit with your last trump to endplay West.

hands.title: 212. Avoidance plus endplay
hands.notes: Keep East off lead (dangerous hand) while engineering a throw-in against West. Strip and exit toward West only.

hands.title: 213. Exit card management
hands.notes: Preserve the 3 of hearts as your exit card for the throw-in. Cashing the wrong heart early destroys the endplay.

hands.title: 214. Duck to place the lead
hands.notes: Duck a heart to the desired defender. West wins and is stuck — any return gives declarer the contract.

hands.title: 215. Throw-in to solve a guess
hands.notes: Instead of guessing which defender holds a key card, strip and throw-in. The defender is forced to solve the guess for you.
